description_long: This is a thick, hardbound book with a deep reddish-brown cover, reinforced at the corners and spine with darker, possibly metallic or leather elements. The cover features a glowing, ornate golden symbol and several deep, claw-like scratches, giving it a mystical or arcane appearance. The book is secured by a wide, dark strap running horizontally across the front and back, with a metallic clasp and a small, attached tag or bookmark. The pages are tightly bound and appear to be of standard white or off-white paper, visible along the sides. The spine and cover both display additional glowing symbols and engraved markings, enhancing its mysterious, magical aesthetic. The overall construction suggests durability and a sense of importance, as if it contains valuable or secret knowledge.
description: A thick, reddish-brown hardbound book with glowing golden symbols, reinforced corners, and a dark strap with a clasp. The cover is marked by deep scratches and mystical engravings, giving it an arcane, magical appearance.
description_view_0: The book is seen from the side, showing the thick stack of white pages and the reinforced corners, with the glowing symbol and scratches partially visible on the cover.
description_view_1: This view highlights the spine, which is wide and features glowing symbols and engraved markings, as well as the dark strap running across the book.
description_view_2: The front cover is visible, displaying the glowing golden symbol, deep scratches, and the reinforced corners, with the strap and clasp clearly seen.
description_view_3: The back of the book is shown, with the strap and a small attached tag or bookmark visible, as well as the continuation of the glowing symbols and reinforced edges.
attribute_cover_illustration: The front cover features a glowing, ornate golden symbol resembling an arcane or alchemical sigil, set against a plain reddish-brown background. There are also several deep, claw-like scratches across the surface, adding a sense of mystery and danger.
attribute_spine_design: The spine is wide and covered in reddish-brown material, with glowing golden symbols and engraved markings running horizontally. A dark strap crosses the spine, adding a reinforced, mystical look.
